summary: The agent recommends using low-dose long-term antibiotics to prevent recurrence due to its effectiveness and lack of better alternatives post-treatment confirmation. This approach focuses more on prevention over further diagnostic testing at this stage. To clarify based strictly upon prompt requirements without additional assumptions or extended discussion about timing relative to initial treatment success would be best captured succinctly hereafter moving forward from confirmed recovery point towards ongoing care planning involving both monitoring culture results alongside potential preventive measures like prophylactics if indicated by risk
